mapper.sql: id, avatar_url, account, password, name, title_id, pinyin_abbr, gender, phone, id_card, status, fixed_phone, email, qq, wechat, address, mailing_address, zip_code, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, birth_date, education, major, native_place, work_unit, nationality, signature, bio, recommended, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_teacher WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_teacher (avatar_url, account, password, name, title_id, pinyin_abbr, gender, phone, id_card, status, fixed_phone, email, qq, wechat, address, mailing_address, zip_code, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, birth_date, education, major, native_place, work_unit, nationality, signature, bio, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{avatarUrl}, #{account}, #{password}, #{name}, #{titleId}, #{pinyinAbbr}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{status}, #{fixedPhone}, #{email}, #{qq}, #{wechat}, #{address}, #{mailingAddress}, #{zipCode}, #{emergencyContact}, #{emergencyPhone}, #{birthDate}, #{education}, #{major}, #{nativePlace}, #{workUnit}, #{nationality}, #{signature}, #{bio}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_teacher SET avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, name = #{name}, title_id = #{titleId}, pinyin_abbr = #{pinyinAbbr}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, id_card = #{idCard}, status = #{status}, fixed_phone = #{fixedPhone}, email = #{email}, qq = #{qq}, wechat = #{wechat}, address = #{address}, mailing_address = #{mailingAddress}, zip_code = #{zipCode}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, emergency_phone = #{emergencyPhone}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, education = #{education}, major = #{major}, native_place = #{nativePlace}, work_unit = #{workUnit}, nationality = #{nationality}, signature = #{signature}, bio = #{bio}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_teacher SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE edu_teacher SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE edu_teacher SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_teacher SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_teacher SET recommended = #{recommended} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, name FROM edu_teacher WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, avatar_url, name, title_id, signature FROM edu_teacher WHERE recommended = 1 AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, avatar_url, name, title_id, signature FROM edu_teacher WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
